Claims for other procedures are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier data file. These other 
procedure claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the first two digits 
are (“P1,” “P2,” “P3,” “P4,” “P5,” “P6,” “P7,” or “P8”).
